description.zh-Hans: 为像素精灵添加呼吸发光、受击闪白、溶解、色相循环、流光和描边脉冲等可见动画。
description.en: Adds visible pixel-perfect glow, hit flash, dissolve, hue, shimmer and outline animations.

triggers.zh-Hans: 精灵发光, 受击闪白, 溶解动画, 流光, 描边动画
triggers.en: sprite glow, hit flash, dissolve animation, shimmer, outline pulse

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 接入任意精灵图像后直接播放，或用时间/波形节点控制强度端口。
exampleUsage.en: Connect any sprite and play, or drive the strength port with time or wave nodes.
